tools.name: compass_list_situations
tools.description: All digital-crisis situations (reactive playbooks: fake link, hacked account, online scam...) and prevention guides covered by Digital Compass, with slugs for compass_get_content. Public Romanian guide, plain language, content in 9 languages. Optional filters: categorie (use case) and audienta (indi

tools.name: compass_get_content
tools.description: The full markdown of a crisis playbook (steps to take now, what NOT to do, how to recognize it next time, where to report) or of a prevention guide. Suitable to relay to the user step by step, in document order. In MCP Apps-capable hosts this renders as a calm step-by-step checklist card (ui://compa

tools.name: compass_find_playbook
tools.description: Matches the situation in the user's own words ("I clicked a link and it asked for my card") against the covered situations. Deterministic keyword matching (title, situation, summary), not guessing. Returns the best 3 matches with a score.

tools.name: compass_report_channels
tools.description: Real reporting channels for digital incidents, from the playbooks' "Where to report" sections. lang=ro/en/hu → channels in ROMANIA (DNSC 1911, Romanian Police, your bank); lang=pl → channels in POLAND (CERT Polska, policja, card blocking). With slug: only that situation's channels; without: all, ded

tools.name: compass_freshness
tools.description: The date of the last editorial review ("last verified") for every playbook and guide — transparency about how fresh the advice is.
